intent: process the first sample with scanpy

blocks.text: I'll process the first sample (Patient 145, Day 0) with scanpy using the standard QC→filtering→normalization→HVG→PCA→clustering→UMAP pipeline.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "body": "scRNA-seq QC+clustering (scanpy): read 10x; calculate_qc_metrics; filter n_genes>=200 & pct_mito<0.20; normalize_total(1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; pca; neighbors; umap; leiden; rank_genes_groups. Plots: HVG plot and PCA variance side-by-side; UMAP colored by leiden; use sc.pl.* not hand-rolled matplotlib."}

blocks.text: Perfect! Now let me present the plan:

input.title: scanpy QC and clustering for Patient 145 Day 0
input.summary: Standard scRNA-seq processing: QC metrics, filtering, normalization, HVG selection, PCA, nearest neighbors, UMAP, and Leiden clustering with markers.

steps.title: Load first sample
steps.description: Extract Patient 145 Day 0 from the combined dataset (GSM5746259)

steps.title: Calculate QC metrics
steps.description: Add n_counts, n_genes, pct_mito, and mitochondrial gene identification

steps.title: Filter cells and genes
steps.description: Remove cells with n_genes < 200 or pct_mito > 0.20; remove genes in < 3 cells
expected_outputs: Filtered cell counts and gene counts

steps.title: PCA and neighbors
steps.description: PCA on HVGs (50 components), then kNN graph (k=15, use_rep='X_pca')

steps.title: UMAP and Leiden clustering
steps.description: UMAP from PCA; Leiden at default resolution (0.1) for community detection

steps.title: Find cluster markers
steps.description: Wilcoxon rank-sum DE test between each cluster and rest

assumptions: Using the combined h5ad file; extracting the Day 0 sample
Human genome; identifying mitochondrial genes by 'mt-' prefix (standard for Ensembl)
QC thresholds: min 200 genes/cell, max 20% mitochondrial fraction
